assumptions: Temporal split: test = year >= 2025, dev = 2023-2024, train = earlier (incl. the 2014-2019 form era).
Train/test are time-disjoint so evaluation does not leak future edits.
warnings: The form era (2014-2019) falls entirely in train; test is git-era only. Layer-specific baselines (form-only detection/correction) therefore use their own within-form temporal split (see obs_t_baselines.py).
